title.zh: 数据帧解剖与 A-MSDU 子帧变体（9.3.2）

blocks.en: If management frames are the paperwork of joining a network, the Data frame is the truck that actually hauls your traffic. Every web page, video chunk, and game packet that crosses Wi-Fi rides inside a Data frame. This lesson takes a beginner-friendly tour of its anatomy, then looks at a clever optimisation — aggregation — that lets one frame carry many payloads at once.
blocks.zh: 如果说管理帧是入网时要填的“文书”，那么数据帧（Data frame）就是真正拉货的卡车。你在 Wi-Fi 上传输的每一个网页、视频分片和游戏数据包，都装在数据帧里。本课先带你以入门视角解剖它的结构，再看一个精巧的优化手段——聚合（aggregation），它让一个帧能一次性携带多份载荷。

blocks.en: The frame starts with a MAC header that always carries Frame Control, Duration, three address fields, and Sequence Control. Two optional fields may follow: Address 4 (a fourth address) and the QoS Control field. The clever twist is the addressing: instead of fixed 'source/destination' slots, the meaning of each Address field is decided by two bits in Frame Control — To DS and From DS. The same Address 1 might be a destination, a receiver, or the BSSID depending on those two bits.
blocks.zh: 数据帧以 MAC 头开始，其中始终包含帧控制（Frame Control）、Duration、三个地址字段和序列控制（Sequence Control）。其后可能再跟两个可选字段：Address 4（第四个地址）和 QoS Control 字段。精妙之处在于寻址方式：地址字段并不是固定的“源/目的”插槽，而是由帧控制中的两个比特——To DS 与 From DS——来决定每个 Address 字段的含义。同一个 Address 1，可能是目的地址、接收地址，也可能是 BSSID，全看这两个比特怎么取值。

caption.en: Data frame layout (Figure 9-119). Address 4, QoS Control, and HT Control appear only when the matching Frame Control bits are set.
caption.zh: 数据帧结构（图 9-119）。Address 4、QoS Control 与 HT Control 仅在对应的帧控制比特置位时才出现。

blocks.en: Here is how those bits assign addresses (9.3.2.1.1 gives the layout; 9.3.2.1.2 the address rules). Two things never move: Address 1 always holds the receiver (RA) and Address 2 always holds the transmitter (TA) — that is how a station knows which frame is for it and where to send the ack. Address 3 (and Address 4, used only in the both-bits-set mesh/WDS case) then fill in the true source and destination. When To DS = From DS = 0, Address 3 is the BSSID and the network identifier slot is filled in.
blocks.zh: 这两个比特如何分配地址（9.3.2.1.1 给出结构，9.3.2.1.2 给出地址规则）：有两件事永远不变——Address 1 始终是接收地址（RA），Address 2 始终是发送地址（TA），站点正是据此判断哪个帧是发给自己的、以及该把 ACK 回送给谁。Address 3（以及仅在两比特都置位的 mesh/WDS 情形下使用的 Address 4）再补上真正的源与目的。当 To DS = From DS = 0 时，Address 3 就是 BSSID，用以标识所在网络。

blocks.en: The rest of the header is quick to name. The Other MAC header fields (9.3.2.1.3) are Sequence Control (fragment/sequence numbers), the optional QoS Control (traffic ID, A-MSDU-present flag, more), and the optional HT Control. The frame body (9.3.2.1.4) carries either one MSDU or an A-MSDU, plus a security header/trailer if the frame is encrypted. The Duration field (9.3.2.1.5) is a tiny timer: for a QoS STA it follows 9.2.5, and for a non-QoS STA it is set to the time to send one Ack plus a SIFS (or zero for group-addressed frames). That number is what other stations copy into their NAV to stay silent.
blocks.zh: 头部其余字段也很好认。其他 MAC 头字段（9.3.2.1.3）包括：序列控制（分片号/序列号）、可选的 QoS Control（流量标识 TID、A-MSDU 存在标志等）以及可选的 HT Control。帧体（9.3.2.1.4）承载一个 MSDU 或一个 A-MSDU，若帧被加密还会加上安全头/尾。Duration 字段（9.3.2.1.5）是个微型计时器：对 QoS 站点遵循 9.2.5，对非 QoS 站点则置为“发送一个 Ack 所需时间加一个 SIFS”（组地址帧则置 0）。这个数值正是其他站点抄进自己 NAV、从而保持静默的依据。

blocks.en: Now the optimisation. Every frame pays an airtime tax: a PHY preamble, the MAC header, and contention before transmitting. Sending many tiny MSDUs one-by-one wastes most of the air on overhead. Aggregation fixes this: an A-MSDU (9.3.2.2.1) packs a sequence of MSDUs into a single frame body, so the whole batch shares one header and one transmission opportunity. The catch — all the bundled MSDUs must share the same receiver (RA), transmitter (TA), and traffic ID — so the aggregate makes sense as one unit.
blocks.zh: 接下来看优化。每个帧都要交一笔“空口时间税”：PHY 前导、MAC 头，以及发送前的竞争退避。把许多很小的 MSDU 一个一个地发，大部分空口时间都浪费在开销上。聚合解决了这个问题：A-MSDU（9.3.2.2.1）把一串 MSDU 打包进单个帧体，于是整批数据共享一个头部、一次发送机会。代价是——被打包的所有 MSDU 必须共享相同的接收地址（RA）、发送地址（TA）和流量标识（TID）——这样这个聚合体才能作为一个整体被合理处理。

blocks.en:
graph TD
    A[A-MSDU = sequence of subframes] --> B[Basic 9.3.2.2.2: header = DA + SA + Length, 4-octet padded]
    A --> C[Mesh 9.3.2.2.3: Basic header gains Mesh DA/SA + Mesh Control]
    A --> D[Short 9.3.2.2.4: header = Length only, most compact - DMG]
    A --> E[Dynamic 9.3.2.2.5: Subframe Control + optional DA/SA, addresses on demand]
blocks.zh:
graph TD
    A[A-MSDU = 一串子帧] --> B[Basic 9.3.2.2.2: 头 = DA + SA + Length, 按4字节填充]
    A --> C[Mesh 9.3.2.2.3: 在Basic头上加 Mesh DA/SA + Mesh Control]
    A --> D[Short 9.3.2.2.4: 头仅 Length, 最紧凑 - 用于DMG]
    A --> E[Dynamic 9.3.2.2.5: Subframe Control + 可选DA/SA, 按需带地址]

blocks.en: The four subframe encodings differ only in how much address overhead each carries, so you pick the cheapest one that still conveys what the receiver needs. The Basic A-MSDU subframe (9.3.2.2.2) is the classic form: each subframe header is DA + SA + Length, like an Ethernet header, with 0-3 octets of padding to keep subframes 4-octet aligned. The Mesh A-MSDU subframe (9.3.2.2.3) is the Basic form used inside a mesh Data frame: it carries Mesh DA, Mesh SA, Length, and an extra Mesh Control field for mesh forwarding. The Short A-MSDU subframe (9.3.2.2.4) strips the header down to just a Length field — the most compact form, used by DMG (60 GHz) STAs where the addresses are already implied. The Dynamic A-MSDU subframe (9.3.2.2.5) is the flexible one: a Subframe Control field carries the Length plus DA Present and SA Present flags, so each subframe includes an address only when it actually needs one.
blocks.zh: 这四种子帧编码的差别仅在于各自携带多少地址开销，因此你要挑选既能传达接收方所需信息、又最省开销的那一种。Basic A-MSDU 子帧（9.3.2.2.2）是经典形式：每个子帧头是 DA + SA + Length，很像以太网头，并用 0–3 字节填充使子帧保持 4 字节对齐。Mesh A-MSDU 子帧（9.3.2.2.3）是 Basic 形式用于 mesh 数据帧时的版本：它携带 Mesh DA、Mesh SA、Length，并多出一个用于 mesh 转发的 Mesh Control 字段。Short A-MSDU 子帧（9.3.2.2.4）把头部精简到只剩一个 Length 字段——最紧凑的形式，供地址已隐含的 DMG（60 GHz）站点使用。Dynamic A-MSDU 子帧（9.3.2.2.5）最灵活：一个 Subframe Control 字段携带 Length 以及 DA Present、SA Present 标志，于是每个子帧只在确实需要时才带上地址。

summary.en: Exact subframe-header sizes and the DA/SA address resolution rule
summary.zh: 子帧头的精确尺寸与 DA/SA 地址解析规则

blocks.en: From the figures: a Basic A-MSDU subframe header (Figure 9-123) is DA (6) + SA (6) + Length (2) = 14 octets, then the MSDU and 0-3 octets of padding; the last subframe is unpadded. The Mesh variant (Figure 9-124) replaces those with Mesh DA (6) + Mesh SA (6) + Length (2) + Mesh Control (6 or 18), and the Length field is little-endian and excludes the Mesh Control field. The Short subframe (Figure 9-125) header is a bare 2-octet Length and is not transmitted by non-DMG STAs. The Dynamic subframe (Figure 9-126) header is a 2-octet Subframe Control (Figure 9-127: Length in B0-B13, DA Present in B14, SA Present in B15) followed by an optional DA (0 or 6) and optional SA (0 or 6) — 0, 1, or 2 addresses. When a Dynamic subframe omits the DA, the destination is resolved by the rules in 10.11. Note also that Table 9-60 ties this back to addressing: for the Basic and Dynamic A-MSDU cases the per-MSDU DA/SA live in the subframe header, so Address 1/Address 2 of the carrier frame need not repeat them.
blocks.zh: 从各图可读出：Basic A-MSDU 子帧头（图 9-123）为 DA(6) + SA(6) + Length(2) = 14 字节，其后是 MSDU 和 0–3 字节填充，最后一个子帧不填充。Mesh 变体（图 9-124）将其换为 Mesh DA(6) + Mesh SA(6) + Length(2) + Mesh Control(6 或 18)，且 Length 字段为小端序并且不计入 Mesh Control。Short 子帧头（图 9-125）只是一个 2 字节的 Length，且不由非 DMG 站点发送。Dynamic 子帧头（图 9-126）为 2 字节的 Subframe Control（图 9-127：B0–B13 为 Length，B14 为 DA Present，B15 为 SA Present），其后跟可选的 DA(0 或 6) 与可选的 SA(0 或 6)——即 0、1 或 2 个地址。当 Dynamic 子帧省略 DA 时，目的地址按 10.11 的规则解析。还需注意，表 9-60 把这点与寻址联系起来：在 Basic 与 Dynamic A-MSDU 情形下，每个 MSDU 的 DA/SA 存放在子帧头内，因此承载帧的 Address 1/Address 2 不必重复它们。
